zh.Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Moleyns於1304年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯時，他的父親Vincent DeMoleyns26歲，母親Isabella Dugale24歲。他於1324年與Gille Egidia de Mauduit在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年3月10日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年56歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Moleyns于1304年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯时，他的父亲Vincent DeMoleyns26岁，母亲Isabella Dugale24岁。他于1324年与Gille Egidia de Mauduit在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1360年3月10日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其享年56岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Moleyns was born in 1304, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Vincent DeMoleyns, was 26 and his mother, Isabella Dugale, was 24. He married Gille Egidia de Mauduit in 1324, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 10 March 1360, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Moleyns est né en 1304, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Vincent DeMoleyns, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Dugale, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gille Egidia de Mauduit en 1324, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1360, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, U: Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Moleyns 1304 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vincent DeMoleyns 26 und seine Mutter Isabella Dugale 24. Er hat 1324 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Gille Egidia de Mauduit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 10. März 1360 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Moleyns è nato il nel 1304 nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Vincent DeMoleyns, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Dugale, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gille Egidia de Mauduit nel 1324, nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 10 marzo 1360, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Moleynsが1304年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで生まれた時，父Vincent DeMoleynsは26歳，母Isabella Dugaleは24歳であった。1324年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズでGille Egidia de Mauduitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1360年3月10日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで56歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Moleyns(이)가 1304년 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vincent DeMoleyns(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Dugale(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 Gille Egidia de Mauduit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Moleyns nasceu em 1304, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Vincent DeMoleyns, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Dugale, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gille Egidia de Mauduit em 1324, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1360, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Moleyns родился в 1304 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Vincent DeMoleyns было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Dugale, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gille Egidia de Mauduit в 1324 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 10 марта 1360 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Gille Egidia de Mauduit en 1324, en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1360, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
